IF DEFT VACATES PREMISES BROOM CLEAN ON TIME, PLTF WILL RETURN SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF HE FAILS TO VACATE, PLTF MAY KEEP DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS.
